reason: The statement applies to the text fragment as it describes the story of Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego who faced the threat of being cast into a burning fiery furnace by King Nebuchadnezzar for refusing to worship the golden image he had set up. It involves a significant man-made threat of destruction by a powerful ruler that would have affected the general public had the three men been thrown into the furnace. However, their faith in their God led to their deliverance from the impending disaster.
